zh.Compton Castle, Marldon, Devonshire, Eng: 英國戴文康普頓 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton於1418年3月24日出生在英國戴文康普頓 卡素時，他的父親William Gilbert Jr38歲，母親Isabel Gambon35歲。他於1442年與Alicia Mules在英國英格蘭戴文普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1475年被列為sheriff of devonshire。他去世於1493年8月5日在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國戴文馬爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton于1418年3月24日出生在英国戴文康普頓 卡素时，他的父亲William Gilbert Jr38岁，母亲Isabel Gambon35岁。他于1442年与Alicia Mules在英国英格兰戴文普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1475年被列为sheriff of devonshire。他去世于1493年8月5日在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国戴文馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin), French, and German: from the personal name Giselbert, composed of the ancient Germanic elements gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble youth’ (see Giesel ) + berht ‘bright, famous’. This personal name enjoyed considerable popularity in England during the Middle Ages, partly as a result of the fame of Saint Gilbert of Sempringham (1085–1189), the founder of the only native English monastic order.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: The Devon family of Gilbert can be traced to Geoffrey Gilbert (died 1349), who represented Totnes in Parliament in 1326. His descendants included Sir Humphrey Gilbert (died 1583), who discovered Newfoundland. — Étienne Gilbert from Aulnay in Vienne, France, married Marguerite Thibault in Neuville, QC, in 1683. Louis Gilbert dit Comtois from Besançon in Doubs married Anne Jacques in Charlesbourg, QC, in 1722. Pierre Gilbert from Barbezieux-Saint-Hilaire in Charente, France, married Marie-Angélique Dufour in Petite-Rivière-Saint-François, QC, in 1756. Charles Dupuis dit Gilbert from Rosnay in Indre, France, married Marie-Jeanne Brunet in Sainte-Foy, QC, in 1741.

variants.name: Gieseke
meanings: North German: from a pet form of the personal name Giselbert (see Gilbert ). Compare Giesecke .

variants.name: Giliberto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Constantino, Costantino, Emilio, Rosario, Santo, Sebastiano, Vittorio.
Italian: from an ancient Germanic personal name (see   Gilbert  ).

variants.name: Gipp
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the personal name Gipp, a pet form of Gilbert . See also Gibbs . Alternatively, if pronounced with a soft g, it is a variant of Jepp, from the Middle English personal name Jep(p), Gep(pe), a pet form of Jeffrey .
German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with the stem geb ‘gift’, as in Gebhard (see Gebhardt ).

variants.name: Gilbertson
meanings: English (northern): from the personal name Gilbert + -son.

variants.name: Giesel
meanings: German: from the personal name Giesel, a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names with the first element gīsil ‘pledge, hostage, noble offspring’. In ancient and medieval ancient Germanic society, the younger children of kings and princes were sometimes sent to be brought up at the court of a neighboring ruler, as a pledge of peace between the two nations or clans. Thus, the male personal name Gisil and its feminine equivalent Gisela mean both ‘pledge’ and ‘noble offspring’.

variants.name: Gilb
meanings: German: from a short form of the personal name   Gilbert  .

variants.name: Gibert
meanings: French and German: from a shortened form of the personal name   Gilbert  . This name was also brought to England by Huguenot refugees in the 17th century.
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Giese
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Klaus, Erwin, Heiner, Heinz, Uwe, Aloysius, Armin, Dieter, Erhard, Ewald, Frieda.

German, Dutch, and Danish: from a short form of the personal name Giselbert (see Gilbert ), or any other ancient Germanic name with gīsil ‘hostage, pledge, noble offspring’ (see Giesel ) as the first element. Compare Giesey .

variants.name: Gibby
meanings: English (Pembrokeshire): from a Middle English pet form of the personal name   Gilbert  .

variants.name: Gebbie
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire and Lanarkshire): from a pet form of the Norman personal name Giselbert (see Gilbert ).

nameMeanings.name: Otho
meanings: Some translate Otho 'happy' and Otto 'rich;' but they would seem to be the same name, for Otho of Freysingen, son of Leopold, Margrave of Austria, and of Agnes, daughter of the Emperor Henry IV., is also called Otto. It was the surname of a Roman emperor, and of one of the Roscian family; It comes from Old German od, excelling, happy, fortunate.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton was born on 24 March 1418, in Compton Castle, Devon, England, his father, William Gilbert Jr, was 38 and his mother, Isabel Gambon, was 35. He married Alicia Mules in 1442, in Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1475, at the age of 57, his occupation is listed as sheriff of devonshire. He died on 5 August 1493, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Marldon, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton est né le 24 mars 1418, à Compton Castle, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Gilbert Jr, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Gambon, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alicia Mules en 1442, à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1475, à l’âge de 57 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devonshire. Il est décédé le 5 août 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Marldon, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton am 24. März 1418 in Compton Castle, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Gilbert Jr 38 und seine Mutter Isabel Gambon 35. Er hat 1442 in Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom Alicia Mules geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1475, als er 57 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of devonshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. August 1493 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Marldon, Devon, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Otho Gilbert Lord of Comptonが1418年3月24日にイギリスデボンコンプトン カストルで生まれた時，父William Gilbert Jrは38歳，母Isabel Gambonは35歳であった。1442年にイギリスイギリスデボンプリモウスでAlicia Mulesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1475年，57歳の時，職業はsheriff of devonshireと記録されている。彼は1493年8月5日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスデボンマルルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John Torpoint, Devon, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세인트 존 토르포인트
ko.lifeSummary: Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton(이)가 1418년 3월 24일 영국 데폰 콤프턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Gilbert Jr(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Gambon(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림우스에서 Alicia Mules(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1475년, 57세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of devonshire이었다. 그는 1493년 8월 5일 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 말를던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton nasceu em 24 de março de 1418, em Compton Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Gilbert Jr, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Gambon, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alicia Mules em 1442, em Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1475, com 57 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devonshire. Ele faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint John Torpoint, Devon, England: сеинт джон торпоинт, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton родился 24 марта 1418 г. в местности комптон кастл, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени William Gilbert Jr было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Gambon, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia Mules в 1442 г. в местности плимоут, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1475 году, в возрасте 57 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of devonshire. Он умер 5 августа 1493 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности марлдон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otho Gilbert Lord of Compton nació el 24 de marzo de 1418, en Compton Castle, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Gilbert Jr, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabel Gambon, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alicia Mules en 1442, en Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1475, a la edad de 57 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devonshire. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra.
